message:
fix: ACK frames immediately to prevent Chrome screencast stalls

The old "adaptive throttling" approach caused ACK debt by only ACKing
rendered frames when getLatestFrame() was called. When frames were
dropped (e.g., during slow rendering), the pending ACKs were discarded
without being sent, causing Chrome to stop sending new frames.

Now ACK every frame immediately when received, preventing ACK debt.
Also reduced stall detection from 3s to 1s for faster recovery.
